data.title: Protest by Sunil Kumar against the stupid principal
challenges: The headmaster Sunil Kumar is a thief and an absolute asshole. He stole funds and told parents like Ramesh to go to hell.
actionSteps: Filed a complaint against Sunil (phone 9988998899). Emailed proof of his stupid actions to authorities.
data.content: Sunil Kumar, residing in Ranchi, is a corrupt bastard who abused the children. Ramesh Gupta (phone: 9876543210) reported his bullshit activities to the district education officer.
